rationale: Ground truth has no substantive concerns (just an 'lgtm' approve), so both candidates trivially achieve full recall and neither fabricates findings — both did real verification (greps, upstream comparison) that appear grounded. X is a clean, well-organized approve with only a non-actionable observation about test-mock limitations. Y reaches the same approve-quality conclusion but adds one concrete, file/line-anchored suggestion (flagging the openai_serving_ prefix inconsistency and proposing a comment) plus a specific semantic check confirming audio_generate's untouched attribute is correct — giving it a slight edge on actionability and depth of diff-level reasoning.
